# mikaio.dev

> Free, fast, private browser tools in 10 languages. No signup, no data leaves your device.

## Tools
- [Age Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/agecalc/): Free age calculator. Enter your date of birth to see your exact age in years, months and days, your total days lived, and a countdown to your next birthday.
- [Age in Different Units](https://mikaio.dev/en/ageincalculator/): Calculate your age in years, months, weeks, days, hours, minutes and seconds.
- [Algebra Equation Solver](https://mikaio.dev/en/algebrasolver/): Free algebra solver. Solve linear equations (ax + b = c) and systems of two linear equations with two unknowns using substitution and Cramer's rule.
- [List Alphabetizer](https://mikaio.dev/en/alphabetizer/): Free online list alphabetizer. Sort any list A-Z, Z-A, by last word, or remove duplicates instantly. Paste your list and click sort.
- [Anagram Solver](https://mikaio.dev/en/anagramsolver/): Free anagram solver. Enter letters to find all valid English words you can make. Great for Scrabble, Wordle and word games.
- [Angle Unit Converter](https://mikaio.dev/en/angleconverter/): Free angle converter. Convert between degrees, radians, gradians, arcminutes, arcseconds, turns and milliradians instantly.
- [Area Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/areacalc/): Free area calculator. Calculate the area of rectangles, circles, triangles, squares, and trapezoids. Enter dimensions and get the area instantly in your browser.
- [Area Unit Converter](https://mikaio.dev/en/areaconverter/): Free area converter. Convert between square metres, square feet, square miles, acres, hectares, square kilometres and more instantly.
- [Aspect Ratio Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/aspectcalc/): Free aspect ratio calculator. Enter width and height to find the simplified aspect ratio, and scale to any new dimension while maintaining the ratio.
- [Aspect Ratio Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/aspectratio/): Free aspect ratio calculator. Enter width and height to get the simplified ratio (e.g. 1920×1080 = 16:9) and scale to any new size instantly.
- [Average Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/averagecalc/): Free average calculator. Enter a list of numbers to compute the arithmetic mean, geometric mean, harmonic mean, weighted average and more.
- [Backwards Text Generator](https://mikaio.dev/en/backwardstext/): Free backwards text generator. Instantly reverse the letters, the word order or the line order of any text in your browser, then copy the result.
- [Base64 Encoder / Decoder](https://mikaio.dev/en/base64codec/): Free Base64 encoder and decoder. Encode text to Base64 or decode Base64 strings back to plain text instantly in your browser.
- [Online Basic Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/basiccalc/): Free online calculator. Perform addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division. A clean, simple, full-featured basic calculator that works entirely in your browser.
- [Binary Translator](https://mikaio.dev/en/binarytext/): Free binary translator. Convert any text to binary code and decode binary back to text, with full Unicode support, instantly and privately in your browser.
- [Number Base Converter](https://mikaio.dev/en/bintodec/): Convert numbers between binary, octal, decimal, and hexadecimal instantly. Free online base converter with instant results.
- [Biorhythm Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/biorhythm/): Calculate physical, emotional and intellectual biorhythm cycles from your birthdate.
- [Blood Type Compatibility Checker](https://mikaio.dev/en/bloodtype/): Free blood type compatibility checker. Select your ABO/Rh blood type to instantly see who you can donate blood to and who you can receive blood from.
- [BMI Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/bmicalc/): Free BMI calculator. Enter your height and weight in metric or imperial units to get your Body Mass Index and category instantly, in your browser.
- [BMR Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/bmrcalc/): Free BMR calculator. Calculate your Basal Metabolic Rate — the calories your body burns at rest per day. Uses the Mifflin-St Jeor equation.
- [Body Fat Percentage Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/bodyfat/): Free body fat percentage calculator using the US Navy method. Enter height, neck, waist and hip (women) measurements to estimate body fat.
- [Body Fat Percentage Classifier](https://mikaio.dev/en/bodyfatrange/): Find your body fat category: essential, athlete, fitness, average or obese.
- [Border Radius Generator](https://mikaio.dev/en/borderradius/): Free border radius generator. Control each corner individually with sliders, see a live preview, and copy the CSS border-radius value.
- [CSS Box Shadow Generator](https://mikaio.dev/en/boxshadow/): Free CSS box shadow generator. Adjust offset, blur, spread and color to design shadows visually. Copy the CSS code.
- [Break-Even Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/breakeven/): Free break-even calculator. Enter fixed costs, selling price and variable costs per unit to find your break-even point in units and revenue.
- [50/30/20 Budget Rule Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/budget503020/): Free 50/30/20 budget rule calculator. Enter your monthly income to instantly see how much to allocate to needs, wants, and savings.
- [Caesar Cipher](https://mikaio.dev/en/caesarcipher/): Free Caesar cipher tool. Encode or decode text using the Caesar substitution cipher with any shift value from 1 to 25.
- [Calorie Burn Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/calorieburn/): Free calorie burn calculator. Select an activity, enter your weight and duration to estimate calories burned. Uses MET values for accuracy.
- [Food Calorie Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/caloriecalc/): Free calorie calculator. Look up approximate calories per 100g for common foods. Great for diet tracking and meal planning.
- [Case Converter](https://mikaio.dev/en/caseconverter/): Free online case converter. Instantly change text to UPPERCASE, lowercase, Title Case, Sentence case, aLtErNaTiNg case and small caps in your browser.
- [Cat Age Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/catage/): Free cat age calculator. Convert your cat's age to human years using the AAHA-recognized formula. Cats age faster in their first two years.
- [Character and Word Counter](https://mikaio.dev/en/charactercounter/): Count characters, words, sentences, paragraphs and estimated reading time.
- [Character Counter](https://mikaio.dev/en/charcount/): Free character counter. Count characters (with and without spaces), words, sentences, paragraphs, and lines in any text. Instant, no signup needed.
- [Checklist Maker](https://mikaio.dev/en/checklistmaker/): Free online checklist maker. Create custom checklists, check off items as you complete them, and track your progress. Saves to local storage.
- [Coin and Note Counter](https://mikaio.dev/en/coinconverter/): Count US coins and banknotes and calculate the total value.
- [Coin Flip](https://mikaio.dev/en/cointoss/): Free online coin flip. Tap to flip a fair virtual coin and get heads or tails instantly, with a running tally. Works in your browser, no app needed.
- [Color Format Converter](https://mikaio.dev/en/colorconverter/): Free color format converter. Convert between HEX, RGB, HSL, HSV and CMYK color formats instantly. Paste any color code and see all equivalents.
- [Color Picker](https://mikaio.dev/en/colorpicker/): Free color picker. Select any color and instantly get its HEX, RGB, and HSL codes. Copy with one click. Works entirely in your browser.
- [Combination & Permutation Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/combinatorics/): Free combination and permutation calculator. Compute C(n,r) and P(n,r) for any n and r up to 30. Shows both formulas.
- [Compound Interest Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/compoundinterest/): Free compound interest calculator. Enter a principal, interest rate, and time period to see how compound interest grows your investment. Monthly, quarterly, or annual compounding.
- [Color Contrast Checker](https://mikaio.dev/en/contrastchecker/): Free WCAG contrast checker. Calculate contrast ratio and check WCAG 2.1 AA and AAA compliance.
- [Countdown Timer](https://mikaio.dev/en/countdown/): Free countdown timer. Enter any future date and see exactly how many days, hours, minutes and seconds remain. Works in your browser, no signup needed.
- [Countdown Timer](https://mikaio.dev/en/countdowntimer/): Free countdown timer. Set hours, minutes and seconds and count down with a clear display and alarm when complete.
- [Cron Expression Builder](https://mikaio.dev/en/cronbuilder/): Free cron expression builder. Build and describe cron schedule expressions.
- [CSS Gradient Generator](https://mikaio.dev/en/cssgradient/): Free CSS gradient generator. Pick two colors, choose linear, radial or conic, adjust the angle, and copy the generated CSS.
- [CSS Minifier](https://mikaio.dev/en/cssminifier/): Free CSS minifier. Remove whitespace, comments and unnecessary characters from CSS to reduce file size for faster page loads.
- [CSV to JSON Converter](https://mikaio.dev/en/csvtojson/): Free CSV to JSON converter. Paste CSV data with headers to convert it to a JSON array of objects. Handles quoted values and various delimiters.
- [Currency Converter](https://mikaio.dev/en/currencyconverter/): Free currency converter with approximate exchange rates. Convert USD, EUR, GBP, JPY, BRL, and 30+ more currencies instantly in your browser.
- [Date Add/Subtract Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/datemath/): Add or subtract days, weeks, months or years from any date.
- [Day of the Week](https://mikaio.dev/en/dayofweek/): Free day of week calculator. Find out what day of the week any date falls on. Check birthdays, historical dates, or any future date instantly.
- [Days Between Dates](https://mikaio.dev/en/daysbetween/): Free days between dates calculator. Find exactly how many days, weeks, and months are between any two dates. Works instantly in your browser.
- [Decimal to Fraction Converter](https://mikaio.dev/en/decimaltofraction/): Free decimal to fraction converter. Enter any decimal number and get the exact simplified fraction form instantly.
- [Decision Maker](https://mikaio.dev/en/decisionmaker/): Free decision maker. Enter your options and let the randomizer pick one for you. Add pros/cons weighting for more realistic choices.
- [Diff Checker](https://mikaio.dev/en/diffchecker/): Compare two texts and highlight differences line by line.
- [Discount Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/discountcalc/): Free discount calculator. Enter the original price and the discount percentage to instantly see the final sale price and exactly how much you save.
- [Dog Age Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/dogage/): Free dog age calculator. Convert your dog's age to human years based on size. Uses updated scientific research, not the outdated 7× rule.
- [Pregnancy Due Date Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/duedatecalc/): Free pregnancy due date calculator. Enter your last menstrual period or conception date to estimate your due date and current week of pregnancy.
- [Date & Time Duration Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/durationcalc/): Free duration calculator. Select two dates and times to instantly see the exact duration in years, months, days, hours, minutes and seconds.
- [Electricity Cost Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/electricitycost/): Free electricity cost calculator. Enter an appliance wattage, hours of use per day, and your electricity rate to see daily, monthly, and annual running costs.
- [Emergency Fund Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/emergencyfund/): Free emergency fund calculator. Enter your monthly expenses to find your target emergency fund size and how many months to reach it.
- [Loan EMI Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/emicalculator/): Calculate monthly EMI, total interest and total payment for any loan.
- [Emoji Picker](https://mikaio.dev/en/emojipicker/): Free emoji picker. Search over 1,500 emojis by name, click any emoji to copy it to your clipboard. Works on all devices.
- [Emoji Text Translator](https://mikaio.dev/en/emojitranslator/): Type text and automatically add relevant emojis based on keywords.
- [Energy Unit Converter](https://mikaio.dev/en/energyconverter/): Free energy converter. Convert between joules, kilojoules, calories, kilocalories, watt-hours, kilowatt-hours, BTU, foot-pounds and electron volts.
- [Currency Exchange Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/exchangecalc/): Free currency exchange calculator. Enter a custom exchange rate and fee percentage to calculate the exact amount received after conversion.
- [Currency Exchange Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/exchangerate/): Free currency converter with sample exchange rates. Convert between USD, EUR, GBP, JPY, BRL and more major currencies. Rates are approximate sample values.
- [Exponent Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/exponentcalc/): Free exponent calculator. Compute base^exponent for any real numbers. Handles negative exponents, fractional powers and large results.
- [Factorial Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/factorial/): Free factorial calculator. Compute n! for any integer from 0 to 170. Shows the exact result, scientific notation and number of digits.
- [Fibonacci Sequence Generator](https://mikaio.dev/en/fibonacci/): Free Fibonacci generator. Enter how many terms you want and instantly see the Fibonacci sequence. Supports up to 80 terms of exact values.
- [ASL Finger Spelling](https://mikaio.dev/en/fingerspelling/): See the ASL (American Sign Language) finger spelling for any word or letter.
- [Flashcard Maker](https://mikaio.dev/en/flashcards/): Free flashcard maker. Create question-answer flashcard sets and study them in a click-to-flip card interface. Data saved locally.
- [Focus Mode Writing Tool](https://mikaio.dev/en/focusmode/): Free focus mode writer. Distraction-free writing environment with live word count, character count and word target progress tracking.
- [Font Properties Preview](https://mikaio.dev/en/fontidentifier/): Preview any font family, size and weight combination.
- [Font Pair Preview](https://mikaio.dev/en/fontpair/): Free font pair preview. Select a heading font and body font from popular Google Fonts to see how they look together in a live preview.
- [Food Calorie Reference](https://mikaio.dev/en/foodcalories/): Calories per 100g for common foods with protein, carbs and fat.
- [Fraction Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/fractioncalc/): Free fraction calculator. Add, subtract, multiply or divide any two fractions and get the simplified result instantly. Also shows the decimal equivalent.
- [Fraction to Decimal Converter](https://mikaio.dev/en/fractiontodecimal/): Free fraction to decimal converter. Enter numerator and denominator to get the decimal form, and see whether it terminates or repeats.
- [Frequency Unit Converter](https://mikaio.dev/en/frequencyconverter/): Free frequency converter. Convert between hertz, kilohertz, megahertz, gigahertz and revolutions per minute (RPM). Shows period in seconds.
- [Fuel Cost Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/fuelcost/): Calculate fuel cost for any trip given distance, fuel efficiency and price.
- [GCD Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/gcdcalc/): Free GCD calculator. Find the Greatest Common Divisor (GCD/GCF/HCF) of any set of numbers. Also shows the LCM. Instant results in your browser.
- [GPA Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/gpacalc/): Free GPA calculator. Add courses with grades and credit hours to calculate your GPA on a 4.0 scale. Supports letter grades A-F.
- [CSS Gradient Generator](https://mikaio.dev/en/gradientgen/): Free CSS gradient generator. Create linear and radial gradients with any colors and instantly get the CSS code. No signup needed.
- [Gravitational Force Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/gravitycalc/): Calculate gravitational force using Newton law F = Gm1m2/r squared.
- [Habit Tracker](https://mikaio.dev/en/habittracker/): Free browser-based habit tracker. Add habits and mark them done each day. Tracks streaks and completion rates. Data saved locally.
- [Hangman](https://mikaio.dev/en/hangman/): Free hangman word game. Guess the hidden word one letter at a time before the hangman is complete. Classic word guessing game.
- [Hash Generator](https://mikaio.dev/en/hashgenerator/): Free hash generator. Calculate SHA-256, SHA-1, and MD5 hashes for any text input instantly in your browser. No data is sent anywhere.
- [Heart Rate Zone Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/heartratezones/): Free heart rate zone calculator. Enter your age and resting heart rate to find your 5 training zones: fat burn, aerobic, anaerobic and VO2 max.
- [Hours & Pay Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/hourspay/): Free hours and pay calculator. Enter hours worked, hourly rate and overtime hours to calculate weekly, monthly and annual gross pay.
- [HTML Beautifier](https://mikaio.dev/en/htmlbeautifier/): Free HTML beautifier. Paste messy or minified HTML and format it with proper indentation for better readability.
- [HTML Encoder / Decoder](https://mikaio.dev/en/htmlcodec/): Free HTML encoder and decoder. Convert special characters to HTML entities and back. Encode < > & " ' and more for safe display in web pages.
- [HTTP Status Code Reference](https://mikaio.dev/en/httpcodes/): Complete list of HTTP response codes 1xx-5xx with descriptions.
- [Daily Water Intake Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/hydrationcalc/): Free water intake calculator. Enter your weight and activity level to find your recommended daily water intake in litres, cups and ounces.
- [Ideal Gas Law Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/idealgas/): Free ideal gas law calculator. Enter any 3 of pressure, volume, moles and temperature to solve for the unknown variable using PV = nRT.
- [Ideal Weight Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/idealweightcalc/): Free ideal weight calculator. Find the healthy weight range for your height and sex using the BMI method and the Robinson, Miller, and Devine formulas.
- [Image Color Picker](https://mikaio.dev/en/imagecolorpicker/): Free image color picker. Upload an image and click to pick exact colors. Shows hex, RGB and HSL values.
- [Inflation Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/inflationcalc/): Free inflation calculator. Enter an amount and years to see how inflation affects purchasing power. Uses a custom annual inflation rate.
- [Investment Return Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/investreturn/): Free investment return calculator. Enter an initial amount, monthly contributions, annual return rate and years to see final value and total gain.
- [My IP Address & Info](https://mikaio.dev/en/ipinfo/): Find your public IP address, approximate location, timezone and internet provider. Uses ipapi.co for lookup. No data stored.
- [JSON Formatter & Validator](https://mikaio.dev/en/jsonformatter/): Free JSON formatter and validator. Paste JSON to format it with proper indentation, minify it, or check it for errors. Works in your browser instantly.
- [JSON Minifier & Formatter](https://mikaio.dev/en/jsonminifier/): Free JSON minifier and formatter. Remove whitespace to compress JSON, or format minified JSON with proper indentation for readability.
- [JSON Path Tester](https://mikaio.dev/en/jsonpath/): Free JSON path tester. Paste JSON and enter a dot-notation key path to extract values.
- [JSON to CSV Converter](https://mikaio.dev/en/jsontocsv/): Free JSON to CSV converter. Paste a JSON array of objects and convert it to a CSV file with proper headers and escaped values.
- [JWT Decoder](https://mikaio.dev/en/jwtdecoder/): Free JWT decoder. Decode and inspect JSON Web Tokens.
- [Keyboard Shortcut Reference](https://mikaio.dev/en/keyboardshortcuts/): Browse and search keyboard shortcuts for Windows, Mac, Excel, VS Code and Chrome.
- [Kinematic Equations Solver](https://mikaio.dev/en/kinematics/): Free kinematics solver. Enter any 3 of 5 variables (v₀, v, a, t, d) to solve the unknown kinematic variables using the equations of motion.
- [Stopwatch with Laps](https://mikaio.dev/en/lapstopwatch/): Free online stopwatch with lap timer. Start, stop, and record lap times. Shows the fastest and slowest laps highlighted.
- [LCM Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/lcmcalc/): Free LCM calculator. Find the Least Common Multiple (LCM) of any set of numbers. Also shows the GCD. Instant results in your browser.
- [Leap Year Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/leapyear/): Free leap year calculator. Check if any year is a leap year and find the next leap year. Instant results in your browser.
- [Light Year Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/lightyear/): Convert between light-years, parsecs, astronomical units, kilometres and miles.
- [Loan Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/loancalc/): Free loan calculator. Enter the loan amount, interest rate, and term to see your monthly payment and total interest paid. Works for mortgages, car loans, and personal loans.
- [Logarithm Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/logcalc/): Free logarithm calculator. Compute common log (base 10), natural log (ln), binary log (base 2), or any custom base logarithm.
- [Lorem Ipsum Generator](https://mikaio.dev/en/loremipsum/): Free Lorem Ipsum generator. Create placeholder dummy text by paragraphs, sentences or words for design mockups and layouts, then copy it in one click.
- [Love Compatibility Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/lovecalculator/): Fun love compatibility calculator based on names.
- [Lucky Number Generator](https://mikaio.dev/en/luckynumber/): Generate a set of lucky lottery numbers.
- [Macronutrient Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/macrocalc/): Free macro calculator. Enter your daily calorie target and diet goal to get protein, carb and fat targets in grams and calories.
- [Macro Ratio Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/macroratio/): Free macro ratio calculator. Enter your daily calorie target and diet goal to get optimal protein, carbohydrate and fat grams per day.
- [Magic 8 Ball](https://mikaio.dev/en/magic8ball/): Free online Magic 8 Ball. Think of a yes-or-no question, tap the ball, and receive one of the classic fortune-telling answers. Fun, instant and private.
- [Markdown to HTML Converter](https://mikaio.dev/en/markdownhtml/): Free Markdown to HTML converter. Paste Markdown and see the HTML output and live preview side by side. Supports headings, lists, links, images, code and bold/italic.
- [Markdown Preview](https://mikaio.dev/en/markdownpreview/): Free live markdown preview. Write markdown and see the rendered HTML preview in real time.
- [Matrix Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/matrixcalc/): Free matrix calculator. Add, subtract, multiply matrices, compute determinants and transposes instantly in your browser.
- [Meeting Cost Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/meetingcost/): Free meeting cost calculator. Enter attendees, average salary and duration to calculate the real cost of any meeting in salary dollars.
- [Memory Card Game](https://mikaio.dev/en/memorygame/): Free memory card matching game. Flip cards to find matching emoji pairs. Tracks moves and time. Tests and improves visual memory.
- [Molar Mass Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/molarmass/): Free molar mass calculator. Enter a chemical formula like H2O or NaCl to calculate the molar mass (molecular weight) in g/mol.
- [Morse Code Trainer](https://mikaio.dev/en/morsetrainer/): Practice decoding Morse code. A letter is shown as dots and dashes.
- [Morse Code Translator](https://mikaio.dev/en/morsetranslator/): Free Morse code translator. Convert any text to Morse code dots and dashes, or decode Morse code back to text. Includes audio playback. Works entirely in your browser.
- [Mortgage Affordability Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/mortgageafford/): Free mortgage affordability calculator. Enter income, debt and down payment to find the maximum home price you can afford based on the 28/36 rule.
- [Multiplication Table Generator](https://mikaio.dev/en/multtable/): Free multiplication table generator. Enter a number to see its full multiplication table, or generate a complete times table grid up to 20×20.
- [Name Day Lookup](https://mikaio.dev/en/nameday/): Find the traditional Catholic/European name day for any first name.
- [NATO Phonetic Alphabet](https://mikaio.dev/en/natoalphabet/): Convert text to NATO phonetic alphabet (Alpha, Bravo, Charlie...).
- [Network Speed Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/networkspeedcalc/): Calculate how long it takes to transfer a file at a given network speed.
- [Net Worth Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/networthcalc/): Free net worth calculator. Add your assets and liabilities to calculate your total net worth. Helps you understand your financial position.
- [Newton's Second Law Calculator (F = ma)](https://mikaio.dev/en/newtonslaw/): Free Newton's Second Law calculator. Solve for force (F), mass (m) or acceleration (a) using F = ma. Shows units and explanation.
- [Online Notepad](https://mikaio.dev/en/notepad/): Free online notepad. Create, save and manage multiple notes in your browser. Auto-saves as you type. No account needed.
- [Net Present Value (NPV) Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/npvcalc/): Free NPV calculator. Enter cash flows and discount rate to calculate Net Present Value and Internal Rate of Return (IRR) for investment analysis.
- [Number Base Converter](https://mikaio.dev/en/numberbase/): Free number base converter. Convert any number between binary, octal, decimal, hexadecimal, or any base from 2 to 36 instantly in your browser.
- [Number Guessing Game](https://mikaio.dev/en/numberguesser/): Free number guessing game. Guess a secret number and receive hot/cold hints. Choose your difficulty range up to 1000.
- [Number to Words Converter](https://mikaio.dev/en/numbertowords/): Free number to words converter. Enter any integer and get it spelled out in English or Portuguese. Useful for checks, legal documents and language learning.
- [Numerology Name Number](https://mikaio.dev/en/numerologyname/): Calculate your numerology name number from your full name.
- [Octal Number Converter](https://mikaio.dev/en/octalconverter/): Free octal converter tool. Instantly convert any number between base 2 (binary), base 8 (octal), base 10 (decimal), and base 16 (hex).
- [Ohm's Law Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/ohmslaw/): Free Ohm's Law calculator. Enter any two of voltage (V), current (A) or resistance (Ω) to calculate the missing value and power.
- [Ovulation Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/ovulationcalc/): Free ovulation calculator. Enter your last period and cycle length to estimate your ovulation date, fertile window and next period date.
- [Running Pace Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/pacecalc/): Free running pace calculator. Enter distance and time to calculate pace per km or mile, speed, and equivalent race finish times.
- [Paint Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/paintcalc/): Free paint calculator. Enter your wall dimensions, number of coats, and paint coverage to calculate exactly how many litres of paint you need.
- [Color Palette Generator](https://mikaio.dev/en/palettemaker/): Free color palette generator. Enter a base color and generate complementary, triadic, analogous or monochromatic color palettes. Copy hex codes.
- [Palindrome Checker](https://mikaio.dev/en/palindromocheck/): Free palindrome checker. Instantly test whether a word, phrase or number reads the same forwards and backwards, ignoring case, spaces and punctuation.
- [Passphrase Generator](https://mikaio.dev/en/passphregen/): Free passphrase generator. Create memorable but secure passphrases using random common words. Much easier to remember than random characters.
- [Password Generator](https://mikaio.dev/en/passwordgen/): Free password generator. Create strong, random passwords with custom length and character sets. Control uppercase, lowercase, numbers and symbols.
- [Password Strength Analyzer](https://mikaio.dev/en/passwordstrength/): Analyze password strength and get actionable improvement tips.
- [Percentage Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/percentage/): Free percentage calculator. Find a percent of a number, work out what percent one value is of another, and calculate percentage increase or decrease instantly.
- [Percentage Change Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/percentchange/): Free percentage change calculator. Find the percentage increase or decrease between two values instantly. Shows exact change and direction.
- [Periodic Table Reference](https://mikaio.dev/en/periodictable/): Search all 118 elements by name, symbol or atomic number.
- [pH Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/phcalculator/): Free pH calculator. Enter hydrogen ion concentration [H⁺] or hydroxide concentration [OH⁻] to calculate pH and classify the solution.
- [Pomodoro Timer](https://mikaio.dev/en/pomodoro/): Free Pomodoro timer. 25-minute focus sessions with 5-minute short breaks and 15-minute long breaks. No signup needed. Runs in your browser with sound alerts.
- [Pomodoro Timer Pro](https://mikaio.dev/en/pomodoropro/): Free Pomodoro timer with session history. Customizable focus and break durations. Tracks completed sessions and total focus time.
- [Pregnancy Week Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/pregnancyweek/): Free pregnancy calculator. Enter your last menstrual period date to find your current pregnancy week, trimester and estimated due date.
- [Pressure Unit Converter](https://mikaio.dev/en/pressureconverter/): Free pressure converter. Convert between pascal, bar, psi, atmosphere, mmHg, inHg and other pressure units instantly.
- [Prime Number Checker](https://mikaio.dev/en/primechecker/): Free prime number checker. Enter any positive integer to instantly find out if it is prime. Also shows all divisors and the prime factorization.
- [Prime Factorization Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/primefactor/): Free prime factorization calculator. Enter any positive integer up to 999,999,999 and instantly see its prime factorization with exponents.
- [Pythagorean Theorem Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/pythagorean/): Free Pythagorean theorem calculator. Enter any two sides of a right triangle to find the third. Works for hypotenuse or either leg. Instant and accurate.
- [QR Code Generator](https://mikaio.dev/en/qrmaker/): Free QR code generator. Create a QR code for any URL, text, WiFi password, or contact information. Download as PNG. Works entirely in your browser.
- [QR Code Reader](https://mikaio.dev/en/qrreader/): Free QR code reader. Upload an image containing a QR code to decode its content instantly in your browser. No app needed.
- [Quadratic Equation Solver](https://mikaio.dev/en/quadratic/): Free quadratic equation solver. Enter a, b and c coefficients to find the roots of ax² + bx + c = 0 using the quadratic formula.
- [Random Color Generator](https://mikaio.dev/en/randomcolor/): Free random color generator. Generate a random colour and see its HEX, RGB and HSL codes instantly. Great for design inspiration and picking palettes.
- [Random Fact Generator](https://mikaio.dev/en/randomfact/): Free random fact generator. Discover surprising and interesting facts across science, history, mathematics, nature and technology with each click.
- [Random Letter Generator](https://mikaio.dev/en/randomletter/): Free random letter generator. Pick one or many random letters from A to Z, in uppercase, lowercase or mixed case, instantly and fairly in your browser.
- [Random Name Generator](https://mikaio.dev/en/randomname/): Free random name generator. Generate random first and last names by gender and cultural origin. Perfect for writers, game developers, and baby name inspiration.
- [Random Number Generator](https://mikaio.dev/en/randomnumber/): Free random number generator. Pick one or many random numbers between any minimum and maximum, with an option for unique results. Secure and instant in your browser.
- [Random Quote Generator](https://mikaio.dev/en/randomquote/): Free random quote generator. Get a new inspirational or motivational quote with every click. Hundreds of famous quotes from history's greatest thinkers.
- [Ratio Simplifier](https://mikaio.dev/en/ratiosimplifier/): Free ratio simplifier. Enter any two numbers to reduce the ratio to its simplest form, find the scale factor, and see equivalent ratios.
- [Reading Speed Test](https://mikaio.dev/en/readingspeed/): Free reading speed test. Read a passage and see your reading speed in words per minute (WPM). Average adult reads 200-300 WPM.
- [Reading Time Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/readingtime/): Free reading time calculator. Paste any text to instantly see the word count, estimated reading time, and estimated speaking time. No signup needed.
- [Regex Cheat Sheet](https://mikaio.dev/en/regexcheatsheet/): Quick reference for regular expression syntax.
- [Regular Expression Tester](https://mikaio.dev/en/regextester/): Free regular expression tester. Enter a regex pattern and test string to see matches highlighted in real time. Supports all JavaScript regex flags.
- [Resistor Color Code Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/resistorcolor/): Free resistor color code calculator. Select the color bands of a 4-band or 5-band resistor to decode its resistance value and tolerance.
- [Retirement Savings Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/retirementcalc/): Free retirement calculator. Estimate your retirement savings based on monthly contributions, expected return, and years to retirement.
- [Rhyme Finder](https://mikaio.dev/en/rhymefinder/): Find words that rhyme with any English word. Great for poetry and lyrics.
- [Rock Paper Scissors](https://mikaio.dev/en/rockpaperscissors/): Free online Rock Paper Scissors game. Play against the computer, see results instantly, and track your score. No download or signup needed.
- [Dice Roller](https://mikaio.dev/en/rolldice/): Free online dice roller. Roll d4, d6, d8, d10, d12, d20, and d100 dice, alone or in groups. Perfect for D&D, tabletop RPGs, and board games. No download needed.
- [Roman Numeral Converter](https://mikaio.dev/en/romanconverter/): Free Roman numeral converter. Convert any decimal number 1–3999 to Roman numerals, or convert Roman numerals back to decimal.
- [Roman Numeral Converter](https://mikaio.dev/en/romanmath/): Free Roman numeral converter. Convert any number from 1 to 3999 to Roman numerals, or convert Roman numerals back to decimal. Instant and accurate.
- [ROT13 Encoder / Decoder](https://mikaio.dev/en/rot13/): Free ROT13 encoder and decoder. Convert text with the ROT13 substitution cipher in real time. ROT13 encodes and decodes with the same operation.
- [Rounding Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/roundingcalc/): Free rounding calculator. Round any number to a chosen number of decimal places, or round up or down, instantly and precisely in your browser.
- [Rule of 72 Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/ruleof72/): Free Rule of 72 calculator. Enter your annual return rate to find how long until your investment doubles, or enter years to find the required rate.
- [Sales Tax Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/salestax/): Free sales tax calculator. Enter a price and a tax rate to add tax to a net price or extract it from a gross price. Works for VAT, GST, and any percentage.
- [Savings Goal Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/savingsgoal/): Free savings goal calculator. Enter your savings target, current savings, monthly contribution and interest rate to see how long to reach your goal.
- [Scientific Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/scientificcalc/): Free scientific calculator. Evaluate mathematical expressions including trigonometry, logarithms, powers and more directly in your browser.
- [Scientific Notation Converter](https://mikaio.dev/en/scinotation/): Convert between standard numbers and scientific notation.
- [Screen Resolution Checker](https://mikaio.dev/en/screeninfo/): Free screen resolution checker. Shows your screen resolution, viewport size, device pixel ratio, color depth, touch support and more.
- [Flag Semaphore Encoder](https://mikaio.dev/en/semaphore/): Encode text as flag semaphore arm positions.
- [Sentence Counter](https://mikaio.dev/en/sentencecounter/): Free sentence counter. Paste any text to instantly count sentences, words, characters, paragraphs, and lines. Shows average words per sentence.
- [Sleep Cycle Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/sleepcalc/): Free sleep calculator. Enter your wake time to find the ideal bedtimes based on 90-minute sleep cycles. Wake up refreshed instead of groggy.
- [URL Slug Generator](https://mikaio.dev/en/sluggen/): Free URL slug generator. Convert any title or text to a clean, URL-friendly slug by removing special characters and replacing spaces with hyphens.
- [Speed Converter](https://mikaio.dev/en/speedconverter/): Free speed converter. Convert between metres per second, kilometres per hour, miles per hour, knots, and Mach number instantly.
- [Square Root Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/squarecalc/): Free square root calculator. Find the square root of any positive number instantly. Also shows the square (n²). Works in your browser with no signup required.
- [Statistics Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/statscalc/): Free statistics calculator. Enter a list of numbers to instantly compute mean, median, mode, standard deviation, variance, min, max and range.
- [Statistics Visualizer](https://mikaio.dev/en/statsviz/): Free statistics visualizer. Enter a list of numbers to calculate mean, median, mode, variance, standard deviation and see a simple frequency distribution.
- [Stock Return Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/stockreturn/): Free stock return calculator. Enter buy price, sell price and shares to calculate total profit, percentage return and annualized CAGR.
- [Stopwatch](https://mikaio.dev/en/stopwatch/): Free online stopwatch with millisecond precision. Start, pause, record lap times, and reset. No download needed. Works entirely in your browser.
- [Data Storage Converter](https://mikaio.dev/en/storageconverter/): Free data storage converter. Convert between bits, bytes, kilobytes, megabytes, gigabytes, terabytes, petabytes and their binary counterparts.
- [Study Planner](https://mikaio.dev/en/studyplanner/): Free study planner. Enter your exam date, total study hours and daily availability to generate a balanced study schedule across your topics.
- [Sunrise and Sunset Estimator](https://mikaio.dev/en/sunrisesunset/): Calculate sunrise and sunset times for any location and date.
- [Syllable Counter](https://mikaio.dev/en/syllablecount/): Free syllable counter. Count the number of syllables in any English word or text instantly. Useful for poetry, song lyrics, and haiku writing.
- [Random Team Generator](https://mikaio.dev/en/teamgenerator/): Free random team generator. Paste names and choose the number of teams to randomly split people into balanced groups. Great for sports, class projects and games.
- [Temperature Converter](https://mikaio.dev/en/tempconverter/): Free temperature converter. Convert temperatures between Celsius, Fahrenheit, Kelvin, and Rankine instantly. See all four scales at once.
- [Temperature Converter](https://mikaio.dev/en/tempconverterx/): Convert between Celsius, Fahrenheit, Kelvin, Rankine, Delisle, Newton, Reaumur and Romer.
- [Test Grade Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/testgrade/): Free test grade calculator. Enter your score and total points to get the percentage and letter grade (A, B, C, D or F) instantly.
- [Text Diff Tool](https://mikaio.dev/en/textdiff/): Free text diff tool. Compare two texts and highlight the differences between them. Find added, removed, and changed words instantly.
- [Text Encoder and Decoder](https://mikaio.dev/en/textencoder/): Free text encoder. URL, HTML entity and Base64 encode/decode.
- [Text Repeater](https://mikaio.dev/en/textrepeater/): Free text repeater. Repeat a word, phrase or line as many times as you like, with a line break, space or comma between copies, then copy the result instantly.
- [Text Reverser](https://mikaio.dev/en/textreverser/): Free text reverser. Reverse characters in text, reverse word order, or reverse the order of lines. Three reversal modes in one tool.
- [Text Summarizer](https://mikaio.dev/en/textsummarizer/): Free text summarizer. Paste any text and extract the most important sentences automatically using extractive summarization.
- [Text to Binary Converter](https://mikaio.dev/en/texttobinary/): Free text to binary converter. Convert any text to binary (01010100...) and binary back to text. Uses 8-bit ASCII encoding.
- [This or That](https://mikaio.dev/en/thisorthat/): Free This or That game. Make rapid preference choices between two options. Fun for parties and learning about yourself.
- [Tic-Tac-Toe](https://mikaio.dev/en/tictactoe/): Free Tic-Tac-Toe game. Play against a friend or versus an unbeatable AI. Classic 3x3 noughts and crosses.
- [TikTok Caption Analyzer](https://mikaio.dev/en/tiktokcharcount/): Free TikTok caption analyzer. See character count vs 2200 limit, hashtag count, word count, and estimated read time. Optimize your TikTok captions instantly.
- [Time Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/timecalc/): Free time calculator. Add or subtract hours, minutes, and seconds easily. Great for calculating total work hours, travel times, and durations.
- [Time Zone Converter](https://mikaio.dev/en/timezoneconverter/): Free time zone converter. Convert any date and time between 40+ world cities and timezones instantly. Shows current time in all cities.
- [Time Zone Difference Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/timezonediff/): Free time zone difference calculator. Find the exact hour difference between any two cities or time zones worldwide. Instant results in your browser.
- [Tip Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/tipcalc/): Free tip calculator. Enter the bill and tip percentage to see the tip amount and total, then split it evenly between any number of people. Instant and private.
- [Tipping Guide by Country](https://mikaio.dev/en/tippingguide/): How much to tip in different countries and services.
- [Tip and Bill Split Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/tipsplit/): Calculate tip amount and split the bill evenly between multiple people.
- [Title Case Converter](https://mikaio.dev/en/titlecase/): Free title case converter. Convert text to title case, sentence case, capitalize first letter of each word, or alternating case instantly.
- [To-Do List](https://mikaio.dev/en/todolist/): Free browser to-do list. Add tasks, check them off, filter by status, and clear completed items. All data saved locally.
- [Trigonometry Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/trigcalc/): Free trigonometry calculator. Compute sin, cos, tan, cot, sec, csc for any angle in degrees or radians.
- [General Knowledge Trivia Quiz](https://mikaio.dev/en/triviaquiz/): Free trivia quiz. Answer 20 general knowledge questions covering science, history, geography, sports and pop culture. Instant scoring.
- [Twitter / X Character Counter](https://mikaio.dev/en/tweetcount/): Free Twitter/X character counter. Counts tweet length with URL normalisation (each URL = 23 chars). Color-coded limit indicator for the 280-character limit.
- [Typing Speed Test](https://mikaio.dev/en/typingtest/): Free typing speed test. Measure your words per minute (WPM) and accuracy with a timed typing test. Shows real-time stats.
- [Unit Converter](https://mikaio.dev/en/unitconverter/): Free unit converter. Convert between meters and feet, kilograms and pounds, Celsius and Fahrenheit, liters and gallons, and many more units instantly in your browser.
- [Extended Unit Converter](https://mikaio.dev/en/unitconverterx/): Convert between speed, pressure, energy, power and data storage units.
- [Unix Timestamp Converter](https://mikaio.dev/en/unixepoch/): Free Unix timestamp converter. Convert Unix epoch time to a human-readable date and time, or convert any date back to a Unix timestamp. Works instantly in your browser.
- [Unix File Permissions Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/unixperms/): Toggle chmod permissions and get the octal code and symbolic notation.
- [Upside Down Text Generator](https://mikaio.dev/en/upsidedowntext/): Free upside down text generator. Flip any text into upside-down characters you can copy and paste into social media, bios and messages. Instant and private.
- [URL Encoder / Decoder](https://mikaio.dev/en/urlcodec/): Free URL encoder and decoder. Encode special characters in URLs with percent-encoding or decode percent-encoded URLs back to plain text.
- [UTM Link Builder](https://mikaio.dev/en/utmbuilder/): Free UTM builder. Create UTM-tagged URLs for Google Analytics and other analytics platforms. Track traffic from email, social media, and paid campaigns.
- [UUID Generator](https://mikaio.dev/en/uuidgen/): Free UUID generator. Generate one or multiple random UUID v4 identifiers instantly in your browser. Click any UUID to copy it.
- [VAT Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/vatcalc/): Free VAT calculator. Add VAT to a net price or remove VAT from a gross price. Supports any VAT rate. Shows net, VAT amount and gross.
- [Vitamin D Sun Exposure Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/vitamindcalc/): Free vitamin D sun exposure calculator. Enter your skin type and sun intensity to find how many minutes of sun exposure you need to produce adequate vitamin D.
- [Volume Unit Converter](https://mikaio.dev/en/volumeconverter/): Free volume converter. Convert between litres, millilitres, US gallons, fluid ounces, cups, pints, quarts, cubic metres and more.
- [Daily Water Intake Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/waterintake/): Free water intake calculator. Find out exactly how much water you should drink each day based on your body weight and activity level. Instant results in your browser.
- [Wave Properties Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/wavecalc/): Calculate frequency, wavelength and wave speed using v = f x wavelength.
- [Week Number](https://mikaio.dev/en/weeknumber/): Free week number calculator. Find the ISO week number for any date. See what week of the year it is today or for any date you choose.
- [Wheel Spinner](https://mikaio.dev/en/wheelspinner/): Free online wheel spinner. Add options and spin to make a random decision. Great for choosing restaurants, games or making any choice.
- [Word Counter](https://mikaio.dev/en/wordcount/): Free live word counter. Paste or type text to count words, characters, sentences, paragraphs and estimated reading time instantly in your browser.
- [Word Frequency Counter](https://mikaio.dev/en/wordfrequency/): Free word frequency counter. Paste any text and instantly see the most common words ranked by frequency. Option to exclude stop words.
- [Word Scramble Game](https://mikaio.dev/en/wordscramble/): Free word scramble game. Unscramble jumbled letters to find the hidden English word. Get hints if you are stuck.
- [Work Days Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/workdays/): Free work days calculator. Count the number of business days (Monday–Friday) between any two dates, excluding weekends. Instant results in your browser.
- [World Clock](https://mikaio.dev/en/worldclock/): Free world clock. Compare the current local time in multiple cities simultaneously. No signup required. Updates every second in your browser.
- [Would You Rather?](https://mikaio.dev/en/wouldyourather/): Free Would You Rather game. Tap a choice to see what others chose, then move to the next dilemma. Fun for parties and icebreakers.
- [Yes or No](https://mikaio.dev/en/yesorno/): Free Yes or No generator. Ask a question and get a fair, random yes or no answer instantly, with a running tally. Works in your browser, no app needed.
- [Zodiac Sign Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/zodiac/): Free zodiac sign calculator. Enter your birthday to find your Western zodiac (sun sign) and Chinese zodiac sign with personality traits.

## Index
- [Index of all tools](https://mikaio.dev/freetools.html)
